goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should 'leave after 11:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
